author: Google AI Studio
about: EnglishUp is a modern educational SaaS platform comparable in polish to Duolingo and Notion, guiding users on the path to fluency with custom AI systems and high fidelity micro-interactions.
privacyPolicy: Your privacy is of the utmost importance. We only retain personal details necessary to facilitate your user profile, daily check-ins, achievements, and educational progress records securely.
terms: By registering an account with EnglishUp, you agree to make educational learning, practice quizzes, and interactive audio speaking tasks a productive habit in accordance with our terms of service.
